title: Aamal and Dua for the first DAY of the Month of Ramadhan

duas.title: Aamal and Dua for the first DAY of the Month of Ramadhan
duas.description:
Perform Ghusl in flowing water and splash thirty palmfuls of water on the head. This act brings about security against all pains and ailments up to the next year.
It is recommended to wash one’s face with a handful of rose water so as to be saved against humiliation and poverty, and to pour some of it on the head so as to be saved from pleurisy.
TWO RAKAAT SALAAT: in the first of which after Sura Hamd recite Sura Fath (Sura no 48) , in the second rakat after the recitation of Sura Hamd recite any other Surah. If one offers this prayer, Almighty Allah will save him from all evils and will keep him under His custody up to the next year.
TWO RAKAAT SALAAT: in the first of which after Sura Hamd recite Sura Ikhlaas thirty times, in the second rakat after the recitation of Sura Hamd recite Sura Qadr thirty times. Thereafter give alms (Sadaqah). Whoever does so, will have purchased from Allah, his safety for the month.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمّ اجْعَلْ صِيَامِي فِيهِ صِيَامَ الصَّائِمِينَ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma aj`al siyamy fihi siyama alssa’imina
segments.translation: O Allah: on this day , (please) decide my fasting to be as same as the fasting of the true fasters,
And decide my acts of worships to be as same as the worship of the worshippers.
And (please) awaken me from the slumber of the inadvertent ones.

segments.arabic: وَهَبْ لِي جُرْمِي فِيهِ يَا إِلهَ العَالَمِينَ،
segments.transliteration: wa hab li jurmy fihi ya ilaha al`alamina
segments.translation: And excuse my offense on this day, O the God of the worlds.

segments.arabic: وَاعْفُ عَنّي يَا عَافِياً عَنِ المُجْرِمِينَ.
segments.translation: And (please) pardon me; O He Who pardons the offender.
O Allah, the month of Ramadan has commenced.
You have made obligatory upon us to observe fasting during it.
You revealed the Qur'an in it

segments.arabic: هُدَىً لِلنَّاسِ وَبَيِّنَاتٍ مِنَ ٱلْهُدَىٰ وَٱلْفُرْقَانِ
segments.transliteration: hudan lilnnasi wa bayyinatin min alhuda wal-furqani
segments.translation: as guidance for people and clear proofs of true guidance and distinction (between the right and the wrong).
O Allah, (please) help us observe fasting in it,
accept it from us,
receive it from us (with acceptance),

segments.arabic: وَسَلِّمْهُ لَنَا فِي يُسْرٍ مِنْكَ وَعَافِيَةٍ
segments.transliteration: wa sallimhu lana fi yusrin minka wa `afiyatin
segments.translation: and keep it sound for us with easiness and good health from You.
You verily have power over all things.

duas.title: Dua by Imam Musa Al Kadhim
duas.description:
Dua for 1st Day by Imam Musa Al Kadhim (peace be upon him)
In his book of ‘Zad al-Ma`ad’, `Allamah al-Majlisi has mentioned that al-Kulayniy, al-Tusi, and others, through an authentic series of narrators, have reported Imam Musa al-Kadhim (peace be upon him) as saying, “Say the following supplication on the first day of the month of Ramadhan, for if one prays to Almighty Allah with this supplication sincerely and without associating any false purposes or showing off, he will be saved, throughout that year, from all seditious and misleading matters as well as all afflictions that may injure his religion or his body; and Almighty Allah will save him from the evils of all the misfortunes that will occur in that year.”

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِٱسْمِكَ ٱلَّذِي دَانَ لَهُ كُلُّ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inni as'aluka bismika alladhi dana lahu kullu shay'in
segments.translation: O Allah, I beseech You in the name of Your Name before which everything kneels down,

segments.transliteration: wa birahmatika allati wasi`at kulla shay'in
segments.translation: in the name of Your mercy which encompasses everything,

segments.arabic: وَبِعَظَمَتِكَ ٱلَّتِي تَوَاضَعَ لَهَا كُلُّ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: wa bi`azamatika allati tawada`a laha kullu shay'in
segments.translation: in the name of Your greatness which dwarfs everything,

segments.transliteration: wa bi`izzatika allati qaharat kulla shay'in
segments.translation: in the name of Your power which subdues everything,

segments.arabic: وَبِقُوَّتِكَ ٱلَّتِي خَضَعَ لَهَا كُلُّ شَيْءٍ
segments.transliteration: wa biquwwatika allati khada`a laha kullu shay'in
segments.translation: in the name of Your control which dominates everything,

segments.transliteration: wa bijabarutika allati ghalabat kulla shay'in
segments.translation: in the name of Your omnipotence which overreaches and possesses everything,

segments.transliteration: wa bi`ilmika alladhi ahata bikulli shay'in
segments.translation: and in the name of Your knowledge which comprehends everything.
O Light! O Holy!
O Foremost before everything!

segments.transliteration: wa ya baqiyan ba`da kulli shay'in
segments.translation: O Ever-living after all things!
O Allah! O All-beneficent!
Send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تُغَيِّرُ ٱلنِّعَمَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati tughayyiru alnni`ama
segments.translation: forgive me my sins that alter the bounties,

segments.arabic: وَاغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تُنْزِلُ ٱلنِّقَمَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati tunzilu alnniqama
segments.translation: forgive me my sins that bring in punishments,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تَقْطَعُ ٱلرَّجَاءَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati taqta`u alrraja'a
segments.translation: forgive me my sins that cut off hope,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تُدِيلُ ٱلأَعْدَاءَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati tudilu ala`da'a
segments.translation: forgive me my sins that give ascendancy to the enemies,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تَرُدُّ ٱلدُّعَاءَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati taruddu alddu`a'a
segments.translation: forgive me my sins that preclude the prayers,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي يُسْتَحَقُّ بِهَا نُزُولُ ٱلْبَلاَءِ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati yustahaqqu biha nuzulu albala'i
segments.translation: forgive me my sins that make me liable to suffer misfortunes,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تَحْبِسُ غَيْثَ ٱلسَّمَاءِ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati tahbisu ghaytha alssama'i
segments.translation: forgive me my sins that stops the rain of the sky,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تَكْشِفُ ٱلْغِطَاءَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati takshifu alghita'a
segments.translation: forgive me my sins that lay bare the sealed,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تُعَجِّلُ ٱلْفَنَاءَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati tu`ajjilu alfana'a
segments.translation: forgive me my sins that whip off destruction,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تُورِثُ ٱلنَّدَمَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati turithu alnnadama
segments.translation: forgive me my sins that leave behind remorse,

segments.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِيَ ٱلذُّنُوبَ ٱلَّتِي تَهْتِكُ ٱلْعِصَمَ
segments.transliteration: waghfir liya aldhdhunuba allati tahtiku al`isama
segments.translation: forgive me my sins that tear up my integrity,

segments.arabic: وَأَلْبِسْنِي دِرْعَكَ ٱلحَصِينَةَ الَّتِي لاَ تُرَامُ
segments.transliteration: wa albisni dir`aka alhasinata allati la turamu
segments.translation: surround me with Your impregnable and invincible shield,

segments.arabic: وَعَافِنِي مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أُحَاذِرُ بِٱللَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ فِي مُسْتَقْبَلِ سَنَتِي هٰذِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa `afini min sharri ma uhadhiru billayli walnnahari fi mustaqbali sanati hadhihi
segments.translation: and keep me safe from the evil of I beware in nights and days in the beginning of this year.
O Allah, the Lord of the seven skies,

segments.arabic: وَرَبَّ ٱلأَرَضِينَ ٱلسَّبْعِ وَمَا فِيهِنَّ وَمَا بَيْنَهُنَّ
segments.transliteration: wa rabba al-aradina alssab`i wa ma fihinna wa ma baynahunna
segments.translation: the Lord of the seven (layers of) earth, all that is therein, and all that is between them,
the Lord of the Great Throne,

segments.transliteration: wa rabba alssab`i almathani walqur'ani al`azimi
segments.translation: the Lord of the seven oft-repeated verses and the matchless Quran,

segments.transliteration: wa rabba israfila wa mika'ila wa jabra'ila
segments.translation: the Lord of (Archangels) Seraph, Michael, and Gabriel,

segments.arabic: وَرَبَّ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ سَيِّدِ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ وَخَاتَمِ ٱلنَّبِيِّينَ
segments.transliteration: wa rabba muhammadin salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi sayyidi almursalina wa khatami alnnabiyyina
segments.translation: and the Lord of Muhammad, blessings of Allah be on him and on his Household, the Chief of the Messengers, the Seal of Prophet!

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ بِكَ وَبِمَا سَمَّيْتَ بِهِ نَفْسَكَ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka bika wa bima sammayta bihi nafsaka
segments.translation: I beseech You in Your name and in the name of that which You referred to Yourself!

segments.arabic: يَا عَظِيمُ أَنْتَ ٱلَّذِي تَمُنُّ بِٱلْعَظِيمِ
segments.translation: O Great! You are He who distributes bounties freely,
repels all avoided things,
gives all abundant things,

segments.transliteration: wa tuda`ifu alhasanati bilqalili wa bilkathiri
segments.translation: doubles the recompense of good deeds with little and much recompense,
and does what He wills.

segments.arabic: يَا قَدِيرُ يَا اللَّهُ يَا رَحْمٰنُ
segments.transliteration: ya qadiru ya allahu ya rahmanu
segments.translation: O Omnipotent! O Allah! O All-beneficent!
Send blessings to Muhammad and his Household,

segments.arabic: وَأَلْبِسْنِي فِي مُسْتَقْبِلِ سَنَتِي هٰذِهِ سِتْرَكَ
segments.transliteration: wa albisni fi mustaqbili sanati hadhihi sitraka
segments.translation: surround me, during this year, with Your protection,
let Your light beautify my face,
let Your love draw me closest to You,
and let Your pleasure to reach me
as well as Your excellent generosity
and Your weighty rewards.
Give me from the good that You have

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ خَيْرِ مَا أَنْتَ مُعْطِيهِ أَحَداً مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa min khayri ma anta mu`tihi ahadan min khalqika
segments.translation: and from the good You give to any one from among Your creation,
and with that kind of Your protection, keep me safe.
O He Who settles all complaints!
O He Who witnesses all confidential talks!
O He Who knows all hidden things!

segments.arabic: وَيَا دَافِعَ مَا تَشَاءُ مِنْ بَلِيَّةٍ
segments.transliteration: wa ya dafi`a ma tasha'u min baliyyatin
segments.translation: O He Who repels whatever misfortune He wishes!
O He Who is oft-forgiving compassionate!
O He Who overlooks excellently!
Make me die following religion and nature of Abraham,

segments.arabic: وَعَلَىٰ دِينِ مُحَمَّدٍ صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَسُنَّتِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa `ala dini muhammadin salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi wa sunnatihi
segments.translation: the faith and traditions of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَعَلَىٰ خَيْرِ ٱلْوَفَاةِ فَتَوَفَّنِي مُوَالِياً لأَوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: wa `ala khayri alwafati fatawaffani muwaliyan li-awliya'ika
segments.translation: with the best departure, make me die following Your friends,
and antagonizing Your enemies.

segments.transliteration: allahumma wa jannibni fi hadhihi alssanati
segments.translation: O Allah, keep me far off, during his year,

segments.arabic: كُلَّ عَمَلٍ أَوْ قَوْلٍ أَوْ فِعْلٍ يُبَاعِدُنِي مِنْكَ
segments.transliteration: kulla `amalin aw qawlin aw fi`lin yuba`iduni minka
segments.translation: from every deed, word, or act that takes me away from You,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْلِبْنِي إِلَىٰ كُلِّ عَمَلٍ أَوْ قَوْلٍ أَوْ فِعْلٍ
segments.transliteration: wajlibni ila kulli `amalin aw qawlin aw fi`lin
segments.translation: bring me near to every deed, word, or act
that takes me near to You in this year.
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!

segments.arabic: وَٱمْنَعْنِي مِنْ كُلِّ عَمَلٍ أَوْ قَوْلٍ أَوْ فِعْلٍ
segments.transliteration: wamna`ni min kulli `amalin aw qawlin aw fi`lin
segments.translation: Forbid me to do any deed, word, or act
that I fear its result,
and I fear Your wrath because of it;

segments.arabic: حِذَارَ أَنْ تَصْرِفَ وَجْهَكَ ٱلْكَرِيمَ عَنِّي
segments.translation: lest, You may turn Your Noble Face away from me.

segments.arabic: فَأَسْتَوْجِبَ بِهِ نَقْصاً مِنْ حَظٍّ لِي عِنْدَكَ
segments.transliteration: fa'astawjiba bihi naqsan min hazzin li `indaka
segments.translation: Then, I am restrained from obtaining my share of good fortune.
O Compassionate! O Merciful!

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْنِي فِي مُسْتَقْبِلِ سَنَتِي هٰذِهِ فِي حِفْظِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`alni fi mustaqbili sanati hadhihi fi hifzika
segments.translation: O Allah, keep me, throughout this year, under Your protection,

segments.transliteration: wa fi jiwarika wa fi kanafika
segments.translation: in Your vicinity, and under Your care.
Cover me with Your protective covering,
and give me Your kindness.
Strong is he who is in Your vicinity,
glorious is Your praise,
and there is no god but You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ ٱجْعَلْنِي تَابِعاً لِصَالِحِي مَنْ مَضَىٰ مِنْ أَوْلِيَائِكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`alni tabi`an lisalihi man mada min awliya'ika
segments.translation: O Allah, make me follow the example of Your upright intimate servants,
attach me to them,

segments.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْنِي مُسَلِّماً لِمَنْ قَالَ بِٱلصِّدْقِ عَلَيْكَ مِنْهُمْ
segments.transliteration: waj`alni musalliman liman qala bilssidqi `alayka minhum
segments.translation: make me submissive to those who convey from You truthfully.

segments.arabic: وَأَعُوذُ بِكَ ٱللَّهُمَّ أَنْ تُحِيطَ بِي خَطِيئَتِي وَظُلْمِي
segments.transliteration: wa a`udhu bika allahumma an tuhita bi khati'ati wa zulmi
segments.translation: I seek Your protection, O my God, lest I am encompassed by my sin, wrongdoing,
immoderation towards myself, going after my whims,
and being involved in my caprices;

segments.arabic: فَيَحُولُ ذٰلِكَ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ رَحْمَتِكَ وَرِضْوَانِكَ
segments.transliteration: fayahulu dhalika bayni wa bayna rahmatika wa ridwanika
segments.translation: as a result, all that will prevent me from attained Your mercy and pleasure
and I may be forsaken by You
and exposed to Your wrath and chastisement.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ وَفِّقْنِي لِكُلِّ عَمَلٍ صَالِحٍ تَرْضَىٰ بِهِ عَنِّي
segments.transliteration: allahumma waffiqni likulli `amalin salihin tarda bihi `anni
segments.translation: O Allah, please guide me successfully to every righteous deed due to which You be pleased with me
and take me nearer to You.

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ كَمَا كَفَيْتَ نَبِيَّكَ مُحَمَّداً صَلَّىٰ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ هَوْلَ عَدُوِّهِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma kama kafayta nabiyyaka muhammadan salla allahu `alayhi wa alihi hawla `aduwwihi
segments.translation: O Allah, just as You saved Your Prophet Muhammad—blessings of Allah be on him and his Household—from the terror of his enemies,
removed his anxieties,
dispersed his troubles,
proved true the promise You made to him,
and fulfilled Your word to him,

segments.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَبِذٰلِكَ فَٱكْفِنِي هَوْلَ هٰذِهِ ٱلسَّنَةِ
segments.transliteration: allahumma fabidhalika fakfini hawla hadhihi alssanati
segments.translation: so also, O Allah, keep me safe from the horror of this year
as well as its epidemics, ailments,
sedition, evils,

segments.transliteration: wa ahzanaha wa diqa alma`ashi fiha
segments.translation: sadnesses, and economic distress.
In the name of Your mercy, make me attain perfect wellbeing

segments.arabic: بِتَمَامِ دَوَامِ ٱلنِّعْمَةِ عِنْدِي إِلَىٰ مُنْتَهَىٰ أَجَلِي
segments.transliteration: bitamami dawami alnni`mati `indi ila muntaha ajali
segments.translation: through the perfection of the perpetuity of Your favors to me up to the end of my lifetime.

segments.arabic: أَسْأَلُكَ سُؤَالَ مَنْ أَسَاءَ وَظَلَمَ وَٱسْتَكَانَ وَٱعْتَرَفَ
segments.transliteration: as'aluka su'ala man asa'a wa zalama wastakana wa`tarafa
segments.translation: I beseech You the beseeching of one who has made mistake and wronged, but then submitted and confessed.

segments.arabic: وَأَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لِي مَا مَضَىٰ مِنَ ٱلذُّنُوبِ
segments.transliteration: wa as'aluka an taghfira li ma mada min aldhdhunubi
segments.translation: I beseech You to forgive those earlier sins
which are counted by Your Preserving Angels
and recorded by Your appointed Angels,

segments.transliteration: wa an ta`simani allahumma min aldhdhunubi
segments.translation: to protect me, O Allah, against sinning

segments.arabic: فِيمَا بَقِيَ مِنْ عُمْرِي إِلَىٰ مُنْتَهَىٰ أَجَلِي
segments.transliteration: fima baqiya min `umri ila muntaha ajali
segments.translation: in the rest of my lifetime up to my death.

segments.arabic: يَا اللَّهُ يَا رَحْمٰنُ يَا رَحِيمُ
segments.transliteration: ya allahu ya rahmanu ya rahimu
segments.translation: O Allah! O All-beneficent! O All-merciful!

segments.arabic: صَلِّ عَلَىٰ مُحَمَّدٍ وَأَهْلِ بَيْتِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: salli `ala muhammadin wa ahli bayti muhammadin
segments.translation: Send blessings to Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَآتِنِي كُلَّ مَا سَأَلْتُكَ وَرَغِبْتُ إِلَيْكَ فِيهِ
segments.transliteration: wa atini kulla ma sa'altuka wa raghibtu ilayka fihi
segments.translation: and give me whatever I have asked from You and whatever I have desirably wanted from You,
for You have ordered me to pray You
and You have promised of response.
O most Merciful of all those who show mercy!
